metadata.description: A marketplace for skills and tools for agentic Power BI development.

plugins.name: tabular-editor
plugins.description: Agentic development tools for Power BI semantic models with Tabular Editor.

plugins.name: pbi-desktop
plugins.description: Connect to Power BI Desktop's local Analysis Services instance to enumerate models, query with DAX, refresh data, and modify metadata via TOM. No MCP server required.

plugins.name: pbip
plugins.description: Get this plugin if you'll work with pbip files, tmdl, or pbir. It helps with file structure and direct modifications.

plugins.name: semantic-models
plugins.description: Get this plugin for agentic development and management of semantic models.

plugins.name: reports
plugins.description: Get this plugin for agentic development and management of reports.

plugins.name: fabric-cli
plugins.description: Get this plugin to work with Fabric / Power BI service, by means of the fabric cli.

plugins.name: fabric-admin
plugins.description: Fabric and Power BI administration; tenant settings audits, governance, delegated overrides, and Entra security group investigation. Requires the fabric-cli plugin.
